If you could remove a cross section of their brain, that is the decision you'd see being weighed. And by the way, we all do this. It isn't solely the domain of clients deciding on entertainment. This stuff happens way down in the reptilian brain and it's what ultimately forces a decision. If the opening paragraph of your website, your promo materials, or an inquiry email address anything except that inner conversation that is going on in their head, then you are already behind the eight ball. ## [09:07 - 12:09]

is to find an audience and speak directly to them in their language, within their comfort zones, and with a huge amount of understanding about who they are.
